name: exp_riskframing
description: FACTORIAL 2x2 (EN+VN): risk_framing (lottery|plain) x show_computed_totals (off|on). Giu nguyen moi tham so game (cung risk/target/seed/CRN) -> chenh lech chi do (a) CACH MO TA hau qua khi truot muc tieu, va (b) co dua san TONG TINH TRUOC hay khong. TRUC A framing: lottery = goc Milinski 'the computer runs a lottery ... the group is hit by a disaster ...' (neo cam xuc); plain = neu XAC SUAT truc tiep, bo 'may tinh quay xo so' + 'gap tham hoa'. TRUC B computed-totals (noi phat hien read≠add): off = agent tu cong don; on = them khoi Current state liet ke quy hien tai + con thieu toi target + ban da dong + nguoi khac da dong (so tien con lai cua minh van luon hien san). O (lottery, off) DUNG LAI game config baseline nen trung CRN voi exp_baseline. Agent trung tinh, full_history, KHONG persona/scratchpad. 12 game (3 risk x 4 dieu kien) x 2 lang x 10 rep = 240 game/model. Phan tich: pivot theo risk_framing x show_computed_totals x risk x language; do main effect tung truc + interaction.
